name: PCMFlowG711
description: G.711 (mu-law / A-law) codec add-on for PCMFlow, focused on real-time voice (VoIP, ESP-NOW transceivers). Pure MIT implementation of ITU-T G.711 with no third-party vendored code. Exposes G711Encoder / G711Decoder via PCMFlow's PCMSink / PCMSource interfaces. Operates on raw G.711 bytes; flash footprint under 4 KB.
keywords: audio, g711, mulaw, alaw, codec, voip, esp-now, esp32, pcmflow
